hero.headline: AI Screens. AI Interviews.
hero.definition: RoboHire is an AI-powered recruitment platform that automates resume screening, conducts AI-led interviews, and delivers structured evaluation reports for every candidate.
hero.subheadline: Say goodbye to spending long hours going through piles of resumes. Our AI hiring agent vets candidates, conducts interviews, and delivers comprehensive evaluation reports automatically.
hero.stat4Context: AI never sleeps or takes breaks

services.title: Three Powerful Ways to Hire
services.subtitle: Choose the solution that fits your needs - or use both for maximum efficiency.

hiring.title: Start Hiring
hiring.subtitle: AI Hiring Agent
hiring.description: Let AI handle the heavy lifting. Our hiring agent screens resumes, conducts interviews, and delivers evaluation reports automatically. Focus on what matters - meeting great candidates.

quickInvite.title: Quick Interview Invite
quickInvite.subtitle: One-Click Batch Invite
quickInvite.description: Upload resumes and job descriptions, then send interview invitations with QR codes and links to all candidates in one click.

api.title: RoboHire
api.subtitle: For Developers
api.description: Integrate powerful AI recruitment capabilities into your existing systems. Parse resumes, match candidates, evaluate interviews, and more with our comprehensive API suite.

howItWorks.title: How RoboHire Works
howItWorks.subtitle: We use AI to act as a hiring agent that vets each resume, contacts and interviews matched candidates, and sends you comprehensive evaluation reports automatically.

step1.title: Set Up Your Job Opening
step1.description: Describe your ideal candidate or upload a job description. Specify must-have skills, experience requirements, and nice-to-haves. We handle the rest.

step2.title: Plug Into Your Workflow
step2.description: Connect your ATS — Greenhouse, Lever, Ashby, BambooHR, or Workable — in one click. Or use our API and webhooks.

step3.title: Receive Best Matches
step3.description: Our AI screens every application, conducts initial interviews, and ranks candidates by fit. You only spend time with the right people.

step4.title: Get Instant Reports
step4.description: Receive comprehensive evaluation reports via webhook. Know exactly why each candidate is a match - skills assessment, interview analysis, and hiring recommendations.

features.title: Everything You Need to Hire Smarter
features.subtitle: From AI screening to automated interviews, we provide all the tools to transform your hiring process.

aiScreening.title: AI Resume Screening
aiScreening.description: Our AI analyzes every resume against your requirements, identifying must-have skills, experience gaps, and hidden potential.

autoInterviews.title: Automated Interviews
autoInterviews.description: AI conducts initial screening interviews 24/7, asking relevant questions and evaluating responses in real-time.

evalReports.title: Evaluation Reports
evalReports.description: Get comprehensive reports with skill assessments, interview analysis, strengths, weaknesses, and hiring recommendations.

timeSavings.title: 90% Time Savings
timeSavings.description: Stop spending hours reviewing mismatched candidates. Focus your time only on the best fits for your team.

apiAccess.title: Developer API
apiAccess.description: Full REST API access for parsing, matching, and evaluation. Integrate AI hiring capabilities into your existing systems.

atsIntegration.title: ATS Integration
atsIntegration.description: Connect Greenhouse, Lever, Ashby, BambooHR, or Workable. Push matched candidates directly into your hiring pipeline.

webhooks.title: Webhook Delivery
webhooks.description: Receive shortlisted candidates and evaluation reports automatically via webhooks. Seamless integration with your workflow.

multilingual.title: Multilingual Support
multilingual.description: Support for 7 languages including English, Chinese, Japanese, Spanish, French, Portuguese, and German.

cheatingDetection.title: Cheating Detection
cheatingDetection.description: Advanced AI analysis to detect AI-assisted answers, ensuring you evaluate genuine candidate capabilities.

product.headline: Everything You Need to Hire Smarter
product.subheadline: Four AI-powered products that work together to transform your hiring from manual screening to intelligent recruitment.

easyHiring.title: Easy Hiring
easyHiring.desc: AI-powered hiring workflow that screens resumes, manages candidates, and streamlines your entire recruitment process.

smartMatching.title: AI Screening
smartMatching.desc: AI matches candidates to jobs with precision scoring, ranking the best fits so you never miss top talent.

aiInterview.title: AI Interview
aiInterview.desc: AI-led video interviews with natural voice conversation. Candidates talk to our AI interviewer — you review the results.

evaluation.title: AI Evaluation
evaluation.desc: Multi-agent AI assessment that evaluates skills, experience, culture fit, and delivers comprehensive hiring reports.

0.a: RoboHire is an AI-powered recruitment platform that automates resume screening, conducts AI-led interviews, and delivers structured evaluation reports for every candidate.

1.q: How does AI resume screening work?
1.a: Our AI analyzes resumes against your job requirements, scoring candidates on skills, experience, and fit. It processes hundreds of resumes in minutes, identifying the best matches automatically.

2.a: RoboHire supports 7 languages: English, Chinese (Simplified & Traditional), Japanese, Spanish, French, Portuguese, and German. Both the platform interface and AI analysis work in all supported languages.

3.a: Yes! You can start with our free Starter plan which includes resume matches and interview evaluations at no cost. No credit card required.

4.q: How does the AI interview work?
4.a: RoboHire generates customized interview questions based on the job requirements and candidate profile. The AI conducts structured interviews, evaluates responses, and produces detailed assessment reports with scoring.

5.a: Absolutely. We use industry-standard encryption for data at rest and in transit. Your recruitment data is isolated per account and never shared with third parties. We comply with GDPR and SOC 2 standards.

6.q: Can I integrate RoboHire with my existing tools?
6.a: Yes, RoboHire provides a comprehensive REST API and webhook support for seamless integration with your existing ATS, HR systems, and workflows. Check our API documentation to get started.

0.quote: RoboHire cut our screening time by 85%. We went from spending 3 days reviewing resumes to getting matched candidates in hours.
0.name: Sarah Chen

1.quote: The API integration was seamless. We built AI hiring into our platform in a single sprint. The documentation is excellent.
1.name: Marcus Weber

2.quote: Multilingual support was a game-changer for our global hiring. The AI conducts interviews in Japanese just as well as English.
2.name: Yuki Tanaka

3.quote: The evaluation reports are incredibly detailed. They've helped us make more objective hiring decisions and reduce bias.
3.name: Ana Costa

cta.title: Ready to Hire Smarter?
cta.subtitle: Join hundreds of companies using AI to find elite candidates faster. Start your free trial today - no credit card required.

footer.tagline: AI-powered hiring platform that helps you find and hire elite candidates before others.

hiring.welcome:
Welcome! I'm your AI hiring assistant. Tell me about the role you're hiring for, and I'll help you find the perfect candidates.

You can describe your ideal candidate, paste a job description, or upload a JD file. What are you looking for?
hiring.gotIt: Great! I've captured your requirements. Let me summarize what I understand:
hiring.confirm:
Does this look correct? You can:
- Type 'yes' to start hiring
- Add more details
- Upload a full JD for more context
hiring.moreInfo: That's a good start! Can you tell me more about:
hiring.orUpload: Or you can upload a job description file for more detailed matching.
hiring.loginRequired: To create your hiring request and start receiving candidates, you'll need to sign in first.
hiring.loginPrompt: Click the button below to sign in or create an account. Your hiring requirements will be saved.
hiring.updated: Got it! I've updated your requirements. Ready to start hiring? Type 'yes' to proceed, or continue adding details.
hiring.jdParsed: I've analyzed your job description. Here's what I found:
hiring.jdConfirm: Would you like to proceed with these requirements, or would you like to add any specific criteria?
hiring.confirmSubtitle: Review and edit the position title before creating the request.
hiring.titleError: We couldn't generate a title. Please edit it manually.
hiring.jdError: We couldn't generate a job description. Please edit it manually.

duplicate.title: Duplicate Title Found
duplicate.message: A hiring request with the title "{{title}}" already exists. Would you like to overwrite it or use a different name?

hiring.success: Your hiring request has been created! 🎉
hiring.step1: Our AI will start screening incoming candidates
hiring.step2: Matched candidates will be interviewed automatically
hiring.step3: You'll receive evaluation reports for top matches
hiring.visitDashboard: Visit your dashboard to track progress and manage candidates.
hiring.chatError: Sorry, I ran into an issue while processing that. Please try again.
hiring.error: There was an issue creating your request:
hiring.tryAgain: Please try again or contact support if the issue persists.

thinking.title: Thinking...
thinking.analyzeThought: Extracting role context, requirements, and missing details.
thinking.benchmarkThought: Comparing your needs with proven hiring patterns for this role.
thinking.draftThought: Preparing actionable guidance, clarifying questions, and next steps.

hiring.signInToSave: Sign in to save your hiring request and start receiving candidates.
hiring.inputPlaceholderWithFile: Add instructions for this JD, or press send...
hiring.helperText: Press Enter to send, Shift+Enter for new line. Upload a JD file for more detailed matching.
hiring.inputHelperText: Press Enter to send, Shift+Enter for new line. Upload JD files for faster setup.
hiring.heroSubtitle: Use natural language to describe the perfect candidate. Our AI agents will scan millions of profiles to find the precision match.
hiring.inputPlaceholderLong: Describe your ideal candidate... (e.g. 'A Senior Frontend Engineer with experience in Three.js and high-performance React apps')
hiring.templatesSubtitle: Start with a pre-built template or describe your own requirements

step1.title: Describe your role
step1.desc: Tell us about the skills, experience, and qualities you're looking for.

step2.title: AI screens candidates
step2.desc: Our AI reviews resumes, conducts initial interviews, and evaluates fit.

step3.title: Review top matches
step3.desc: Get detailed reports on your best candidates and make faster hiring decisions.

hiring.ctaSubtitle: Join thousands of companies using AI to hire faster and smarter.
hiring.quickStartPrompt: I want to hire a {{role}}. Please help me define the requirements, must-have skills, nice-to-have skills, responsibilities, and any other relevant details for this position.

suggestions.title: Try asking
suggestions.general1: Refine must-have vs nice-to-have skills for {{role}}.
suggestions.general2: Suggest an interview plan and scorecard for this role.
suggestions.general3: Draft the final job description now.
suggestions.confirm1: Shorten the JD into 8 bullet points.
suggestions.confirm2: Add compensation range and target start date.
suggestions.confirm3: Tailor this JD for remote-first candidates.

hiring.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this chat?
hiring.tryDifferentSearch: Try a different search term or category

aiSoftwareEngineer.title: AI Software Engineer
aiSoftwareEngineer.description: Build AI products end-to-end with modern ML stacks
aiSoftwareEngineer.requirements:
We are hiring an AI Software Engineer to build AI-powered products end-to-end.

**Responsibilities:**
- Build AI features from prototype to production
- Integrate model APIs, vector search, and data pipelines
- Design scalable inference services and monitoring
- Collaborate with product to define AI user experiences

**Requirements:**
- 4+ years of software engineering experience
- Strong Python/TypeScript and backend skills
- Experience with LLM APIs or ML frameworks
- Familiarity with vector databases and RAG patterns
- Solid knowledge of cloud services and observability

**Nice to have:**
- Experience with model fine-tuning or evaluation
- MLOps or ML platform experience
- Background in NLP

aiLlmEngineer.title: AI LLM Engineer
aiLlmEngineer.description: Own LLM pipelines, evaluation, and model performance
aiLlmEngineer.requirements:
We are looking for an AI LLM Engineer to own our LLM stack and evaluation.

**Responsibilities:**
- Build prompt and retrieval pipelines for LLM applications
- Optimize latency, cost, and quality of model outputs
- Implement evaluation frameworks and guardrails
- Work with data to improve model performance

**Requirements:**
- 3+ years in ML/AI engineering
- Deep experience with LLMs, RAG, and embeddings
- Proficiency in Python and modern ML tooling
- Experience with vector stores and evaluation metrics
- Strong understanding of prompt design and safety

**Nice to have:**
- Fine-tuning experience with OpenAI/Anthropic/OSS models
- Experience with LangChain or LlamaIndex
- Research background in NLP

fullStackEngineer.title: Full Stack Engineer
fullStackEngineer.description: Ship features across frontend, backend, and data
fullStackEngineer.requirements:
We are hiring a Full Stack Engineer to ship features across frontend and backend.

**Responsibilities:**
- Build and maintain web apps and APIs
- Own features from UI to database
- Collaborate with design and product to deliver polished UX
- Improve performance, reliability, and testing

**Requirements:**
- 4+ years of full stack development
- Strong React and TypeScript skills
- Experience building REST APIs (Node, Python, or Go)
- Proficient with SQL databases and ORM
- Familiarity with cloud deployment and CI/CD

**Nice to have:**
- Experience with Next.js
- Observability/monitoring experience
- Prior startup experience

seniorSoftwareEngineer.title: Senior Software Engineer
seniorSoftwareEngineer.description: Build scalable systems and mentor junior developers
seniorSoftwareEngineer.requirements:
We are looking for a Senior Software Engineer to join our team.

**Responsibilities:**
- Design and implement scalable backend services
- Lead technical discussions and code reviews
- Mentor junior developers and contribute to engineering culture
- Collaborate with product and design teams

**Requirements:**
- 5+ years of software development experience
- Strong proficiency in one or more programming languages (Python, Java, TypeScript, Go)
- Experience with cloud services (AWS, GCP, or Azure)
- Experience with databases (SQL and NoSQL)
- Strong problem-solving skills and attention to detail

**Nice to have:**
- Experience with microservices architecture
- Familiarity with containerization (Docker, Kubernetes)
- Open source contributions

frontendDeveloper.title: Frontend Developer
frontendDeveloper.description: Create beautiful and performant user interfaces
frontendDeveloper.requirements:
We are hiring a Frontend Developer to build exceptional user experiences.

**Responsibilities:**
- Develop responsive web applications using React/Vue
- Implement pixel-perfect designs from Figma
- Optimize application performance
- Write clean, maintainable code with tests

**Requirements:**
- 3+ years of frontend development experience
- Expert knowledge of React or Vue.js
- Strong CSS skills (Tailwind, styled-components)
- Experience with TypeScript
- Understanding of web performance optimization

**Nice to have:**
- Experience with Next.js or Nuxt.js
- Mobile development experience (React Native)
- UI/UX design sensibility

devopsEngineer.title: DevOps Engineer
devopsEngineer.description: Build and maintain robust CI/CD pipelines
devopsEngineer.requirements:
We need a DevOps Engineer to improve our infrastructure and deployment processes.

**Responsibilities:**
- Design and maintain CI/CD pipelines
- Manage cloud infrastructure (AWS/GCP)
- Implement monitoring and alerting systems
- Ensure security best practices

**Requirements:**
- 4+ years of DevOps/SRE experience
- Strong knowledge of AWS or GCP
- Experience with Kubernetes and Docker
- Proficiency in infrastructure as code (Terraform, CloudFormation)
- Scripting skills (Python, Bash)

**Nice to have:**
- Security certifications
- Experience with GitOps
- On-call rotation experience

dataScientist.title: Data Scientist
dataScientist.description: Turn data into actionable insights and ML models
dataScientist.requirements:
We are looking for a Data Scientist to help us leverage our data.

**Responsibilities:**
- Build and deploy machine learning models
- Analyze large datasets to extract insights
- Collaborate with product teams on data-driven features
- Create dashboards and visualizations

**Requirements:**
- 3+ years of data science experience
- Strong Python skills (pandas, scikit-learn, TensorFlow/PyTorch)
- Experience with SQL and data warehouses
- Statistics and machine learning fundamentals
- Excellent communication skills

**Nice to have:**
- Experience with NLP or computer vision
- MLOps experience
- PhD in a quantitative field

softwareArchitect.title: Software/System Architect
softwareArchitect.description: Design and own the technical architecture for scalable, reliable systems
softwareArchitect.requirements:
We are looking for a Software/System Architect to design and oversee the technical architecture of our platform.

Responsibilities:
- Define system architecture, technology stack, and design patterns
- Lead technical design reviews and ensure architectural consistency
- Evaluate trade-offs in scalability, reliability, and performance
- Mentor senior engineers on architecture best practices
- Collaborate with product and engineering leadership on technical roadmap

Must-haves:
- 8+ years software engineering, 3+ years in architect/lead roles
- Deep expertise in distributed systems, microservices, and cloud-native architecture
- Proficiency in at least two of: Java, Go, Python, TypeScript
- Experience with AWS/GCP/Azure at scale
- Strong communication skills for technical and non-technical audiences

Nice-to-haves:
- Experience with event-driven architecture (Kafka, RabbitMQ)
- Familiarity with infrastructure as code (Terraform, Pulumi)
- Background in high-traffic consumer or SaaS platforms

quantumAlgorithmEngineer.title: Quantum Algorithm Engineer
quantumAlgorithmEngineer.description: Research and implement quantum algorithms for real-world computational problems
quantumAlgorithmEngineer.requirements:
We are looking for a Quantum Algorithm Engineer to design and implement quantum algorithms for optimization, simulation, and machine learning applications.

Responsibilities:
- Research and develop quantum algorithms (VQE, QAOA, quantum ML)
- Implement and benchmark algorithms on quantum simulators and real hardware
- Analyze computational complexity and quantum advantage scenarios
- Collaborate with domain experts to identify quantum-applicable problems
- Publish findings and contribute to the quantum computing community

Must-haves:
- MS/PhD in Physics, Computer Science, Mathematics, or related field
- 3+ years experience in quantum computing research or engineering
- Proficiency in Qiskit, Cirq, or PennyLane
- Strong foundation in linear algebra, probability, and quantum mechanics
- Experience with Python and scientific computing (NumPy, SciPy)

Nice-to-haves:
- Publications in quantum computing journals or conferences
- Experience with quantum error correction and fault-tolerant computing
- Knowledge of quantum hardware (superconducting, trapped ion, photonic)

chipDesignEngineer.title: Chip Design Engineer (SoC/IC)
chipDesignEngineer.description: Design and verify next-generation SoC/IC chips from RTL to tape-out
chipDesignEngineer.requirements:
We are looking for a Chip Design Engineer to contribute to the design, verification, and tape-out of next-generation SoC/IC products.

Responsibilities:
- Design and implement RTL for digital logic blocks and SoC subsystems
- Perform logic synthesis, timing analysis, and design-for-test (DFT)
- Develop and run verification testbenches (UVM/SystemVerilog)
- Collaborate with physical design, firmware, and validation teams
- Participate in architecture exploration and micro-architecture definition

Must-haves:
- BS/MS in Electrical Engineering, Computer Engineering, or related field
- 5+ years of SoC/IC design experience
- Proficiency in Verilog/SystemVerilog and RTL design
- Experience with EDA tools (Synopsys, Cadence, Mentor)
- Strong understanding of digital design, timing closure, and low-power design

Nice-to-haves:
- Experience with RISC-V or ARM processor design
- Knowledge of high-speed interfaces (PCIe, DDR, USB)
- Familiarity with FPGA prototyping and emulation
- Tape-out experience on advanced process nodes (7nm, 5nm, 3nm)

productManager.title: Product Manager
productManager.description: Define product strategy and drive execution
productManager.requirements:
We need a Product Manager to lead our product development.

**Responsibilities:**
- Define product roadmap and strategy
- Gather and prioritize requirements
- Work closely with engineering and design
- Analyze metrics and drive product decisions

**Requirements:**
- 4+ years of product management experience
- Experience with agile methodologies
- Strong analytical and problem-solving skills
- Excellent communication and stakeholder management
- Technical background is a plus

**Nice to have:**
- Experience in B2B SaaS
- SQL and data analysis skills
- MBA or relevant degree

scrumMaster.title: Scrum Master
scrumMaster.description: Facilitate agile processes and team efficiency
scrumMaster.requirements:
We are hiring a Scrum Master to help our teams deliver effectively.

**Responsibilities:**

- Remove impediments and coach the team
- Track and improve team metrics

**Requirements:**

- Certified Scrum Master (CSM) or equivalent
- Experience with multiple agile frameworks
- Strong facilitation skills
- Experience with Jira or similar tools

**Nice to have:**
- Technical background
- SAFe certification
- Coaching certification

uxDesigner.title: UX Designer
uxDesigner.description: Create intuitive and delightful user experiences
uxDesigner.requirements:
We need a UX Designer to shape our product experience.

**Responsibilities:**

- Create wireframes, prototypes, and user flows
- Collaborate with product and engineering teams
- Maintain and evolve design system

**Requirements:**

- Proficiency in Figma
- Strong portfolio demonstrating UX process

- Understanding of accessibility standards

**Nice to have:**
- UI design skills
- Motion design experience
- Experience with design systems

uiDesigner.title: UI Designer
uiDesigner.description: Craft beautiful visual designs and interfaces
uiDesigner.requirements:
We are looking for a UI Designer to create stunning interfaces.

**Responsibilities:**

**Nice to have:**

- Illustration abilities
- Brand design experience

**Nice to have:**

salesEngineer.title: Sales Engineer

marketingManager.title: Marketing Manager

dataAnnotation.title: Data Annotation Specialist
dataAnnotation.description: Manage data labeling pipelines and quality for AI/ML models
dataAnnotation.requirements:
We are hiring a Data Annotation Specialist to support our AI/ML initiatives.

**Responsibilities:**
- Annotate and label datasets for machine learning training
- Define and maintain labeling guidelines and standards
- Perform quality assurance on labeled data
- Coordinate with ML engineers on annotation requirements
- Manage annotation tools and workflows

**Requirements:**
- 1+ years of data annotation or labeling experience
- Familiarity with annotation tools (Label Studio, Prodigy, etc.)
- Strong attention to detail and consistency
- Understanding of NLP or computer vision tasks
- Good communication and documentation skills

**Nice to have:**
- Experience with LLM fine-tuning data preparation
- Python scripting for data processing
- Background in linguistics or domain expertise

wecomOperations.description: Drive customer engagement and growth through WeCom (Enterprise WeChat)
wecomOperations.requirements:

- Build and manage customer communities and groups
- Create content calendars and publish campaigns
- Analyze engagement metrics and optimize conversion funnels
- Coordinate with sales and marketing teams on lead nurturing

**Requirements:**
- 2+ years of WeCom or WeChat operations experience
- Strong copywriting and content creation skills
- Experience with WeCom APIs and third-party tools
- Data-driven mindset with analytics experience
- Understanding of private domain traffic strategies

**Nice to have:**
- Experience with CRM integration
- Knowledge of marketing automation tools
- Community management background

postCreation.title: Hiring Request Created!
postCreation.subtitle: What would you like to do next?
postCreation.smartMatchDesc: Run AI matching after the job is ready so downstream interview invitations use the correct job configuration.

postCreation.createJobError: Unable to create a job right now. Please try again.
postCreation.smartMatchNeedsJob: Create a job first to unlock matching and interview invitations.

searchExamples.fullstack: Full-stack Engineers with 5+ years experience at Series B startups, skilled in Python and Node.js
searchExamples.marketing: Marketing Manager in Europe, German-speaking, working at a large enterprise
searchExamples.scientist: Senior Data Scientist, 8+ years experience, strong in NLP and recommendation systems
searchExamples.consultant: Management Consultant with 2+ years at top consulting firms, MBA preferred
searchExamples.sales: Enterprise Sales Manager with experience in SaaS/ERP, proven track record of closing $1M+ deals

dashboard.subtitle: Manage your hiring requests and track candidates.

requests.title: Your Hiring Requests

confirm.deleteDesc: This will permanently delete this request and all associated candidates. This action cannot be undone.
confirm.archiveDesc: This will close the request and move it to archived status. You can still view it in your list.

detail.title: Request Details
detail.noJobDescription: No job description yet. Use AI to generate one from your hiring requirements.

autoMatch.title: Resume Screening
autoMatch.noResumes: No resumes in your library. Upload resumes first.

intelligence.title: Recruitment Intelligence Report
intelligence.noReportDesc: Generate an AI-powered recruitment intelligence report for this position.

hero.headline: Build AI-powered hiring in minutes
hero.subheadline: Integrate intelligent resume matching, interview evaluation, and candidate screening into your application with just a few lines of code.

what.title: Powerful AI recruitment APIs
what.description: RoboHire provides a complete suite of AI-powered recruitment tools. Match resumes to job descriptions, parse documents, evaluate interviews, and automate candidate communication - all through simple REST API endpoints.

signup.title: Sign up or log in
signup.desc: Create a free account or log in to access your RoboHire dashboard.

apikey.title: Get your API key
apikey.desc: Generate an API key from your dashboard to start making API calls.

develop.title: Start building
develop.desc: Integrate RoboHire into your application with our comprehensive documentation.

features.title: Everything you need to automate hiring
features.subtitle: Powerful APIs that handle the complex AI work behind the scenes.

matching.title: AI Resume Matching
matching.desc: Match resumes against job descriptions with AI-powered scoring and detailed analysis.

parsing.title: Document Parsing
parsing.desc: Extract structured data from resumes and job descriptions in PDF format.

evaluation.title: Interview Evaluation
evaluation.desc: Analyze interview transcripts with comprehensive scoring and cheating detection.

invitation.title: Candidate Invitations
invitation.desc: Generate professional interview invitation emails automatically.

multilingual.title: Multilingual Support
multilingual.desc: Support for 7 languages including English, Chinese, Japanese, and more.

webhooks.title: Webhook Integration
webhooks.desc: Receive real-time updates via webhooks when candidates are processed.

ats.title: ATS Integration
ats.desc: Connect Greenhouse, Lever, Ashby, BambooHR, or Workable to sync candidates directly into your hiring pipeline.

playground.title: Try it in the Playground
playground.description: Test our APIs interactively before integrating them into your application.

cta.title: Get your API key
cta.description: Start building AI-powered hiring features today. Free to start, no credit card required.

tryIt.title: Try it out
tryIt.description: Test the APIs interactively in our playground.

overview.title: RoboHire Documentation
overview.intro: Welcome to the RoboHire documentation. Learn how to integrate AI-powered recruitment features into your application.
overview.quickStartDesc: Follow our quick start guide to make your first API call.
overview.authDesc: All API requests require authentication using an API key. Include your key in the request headers:
overview.helpDesc: If you have questions or need assistance, check out our resources or reach out to support.

ep.matchResumeDesc: Match resumes against job descriptions with AI scoring.
ep.parseResumeDesc: Extract structured data from resume PDFs.
ep.parseJdDesc: Extract structured data from job description documents.
ep.evaluateInterviewDesc: Analyze interview transcripts with comprehensive scoring.

quickStart.title: Quick Start
quickStart.intro: Get up and running with the RoboHire in just a few minutes.

step1.title: Get your API key
step1.desc: Sign up for a RoboHire account and generate an API key from your dashboard.

step2.title: Install dependencies (optional)
step2.desc: Install any HTTP client library for your programming language.

step3.title: Make your first API call
step3.desc: Let's match a resume against a job description:

step4.title: Handle the response
step4.desc: You'll receive a JSON response with the match analysis:

auth.title: Authentication
auth.intro: Learn how to authenticate your API requests to RoboHire.

apiKeys.title: API Keys
apiKeys.desc: API keys are the primary way to authenticate with the RoboHire. Each key is prefixed with "rh_" and provides full access to the API on behalf of your account.

warning.title: Keep your API keys secure
warning.desc: Never expose your API keys in client-side code, public repositories, or anywhere they could be accessed by unauthorized parties.

apiKeys.step1: Log in to your RoboHire dashboard
apiKeys.step3: Click "Create Key" and provide a name
apiKeys.step4: Copy and securely store your key (shown only once)

using.title: Using API Keys
using.desc: Include your API key in the Authorization header of each request:
using.xApiKeyDesc: Alternatively, you can use the X-API-Key header:

scopes.title: Key Scopes
scopes.desc: API keys can have different scopes to limit their permissions:
scopes.write: Access to create and modify operations (POST, PUT, DELETE)

errors.title: Authentication Errors
errors.desc: If authentication fails, you will receive one of these error responses:
errors.invalidToken: The provided API key is invalid or has been revoked.
errors.insufficientScopes: The API key does not have the required scopes for this operation.

bestPractices.title: Best Practices
bestPractices.envVars: Store API keys in environment variables, not in code
bestPractices.rotate: Rotate keys periodically and after any potential exposure
bestPractices.minScope: Use the minimum required scopes for each key
bestPractices.expiration: Set expiration dates for keys when possible
bestPractices.separate: Use separate keys for development and production

matchResume.title: Match Resume
matchResume.intro: Match a resume against a job description to get an AI-powered compatibility score and detailed analysis.
matchResume.endpointDesc: Match a resume against a job description
matchResume.noteDesc: You can provide either text content (resumeText/jdText) or base64-encoded PDF files (resumeFile/jdFile). If both are provided, the file takes precedence.

scoring.title: Match Scoring
scoring.desc: The match score is calculated based on multiple factors:
scoring.strong: Excellent fit, meets or exceeds requirements

tryIt.title: Try it out
tryIt.desc: Test this endpoint interactively in the API Playground.

parseResume.title: Parse Resume
parseResume.intro: Extract structured data from a resume PDF, including contact information, experience, education, and skills.
parseResume.endpointDesc: Parse a resume PDF into structured data
parseResume.tipDesc: For best results, ensure the PDF is text-based (not a scanned image). OCR-based parsing may have reduced accuracy.

tryIt.title: Try it out
tryIt.desc: Test this endpoint interactively in the API Playground.

parseJD.title: Parse Job Description
parseJD.intro: Extract structured data from a job description document, including requirements, responsibilities, and benefits.
parseJD.endpointDesc: Parse a job description document into structured data

requirements.title: Requirements Structure
requirements.desc: The requirements object contains categorized qualifications:
requirements.mustHave: Required qualifications the candidate must possess
requirements.niceToHave: Preferred qualifications that are beneficial but not mandatory

tryIt.title: Try it out
tryIt.desc: Test this endpoint interactively in the API Playground.

inviteCandidate.title: Invite Candidate
inviteCandidate.intro: Generate professional interview invitation emails for candidates. The AI crafts personalized messages based on the provided details.

tryIt.title: Try it out
tryIt.desc: Test this endpoint interactively in the API Playground.

evaluateInterview.title: Evaluate Interview
evaluateInterview.intro: Analyze interview transcripts to generate comprehensive evaluation reports with scoring, recommendations, and cheating detection.

cheating.title: Cheating Detection
cheating.desc: The API analyzes transcripts for potential cheating indicators:
cheating.verbatim: Responses that seem to be read verbatim

evaluateInterview.noteDesc: Cheating analysis is advisory and should be used alongside human judgment. A high suspicion level does not definitively indicate cheating.

tryIt.title: Try it out
tryIt.desc: Test this endpoint interactively in the API Playground.

webhooks.title: Webhooks
webhooks.intro: Receive real-time notifications when events occur in RoboHire. Webhooks allow you to integrate with your existing systems and automate workflows.

setup.title: Setting Up Webhooks
setup.step1: Configure your webhook URL in the dashboard settings
setup.step2: Select which events you want to receive
setup.step3: Copy your webhook secret for signature verification
setup.step4: Implement an endpoint to receive webhook payloads

verification.title: Signature Verification
verification.desc: All webhook requests include an X-RoboHire-Signature header containing an HMAC-SHA256 signature of the payload. Always verify this signature to ensure the webhook is from RoboHire.

bestPractices.title: Best Practices
bestPractices.respond: Respond quickly: Return a 200 status within 5 seconds to avoid timeouts
bestPractices.async: Process asynchronously: Queue webhook processing for heavy operations
bestPractices.duplicates: Handle duplicates: Use webhookId to detect and handle duplicate deliveries
bestPractices.verify: Always verify: Check the signature on every request
bestPractices.https: Use HTTPS: Always use HTTPS endpoints for security

retries.title: Retry Policy
retries.desc: If your endpoint returns an error or times out, we will retry the webhook delivery:

errors.title: Error Handling
errors.intro: Learn how to handle errors returned by the RoboHire and implement robust error handling in your application.

format.title: Error Response Format
format.desc: When an error occurs, the API returns a JSON response with the following structure:

badRequest.desc: The request was malformed or missing required parameters
badRequest.fix: Check the request body and ensure all required fields are provided

validation.desc: One or more request parameters failed validation
validation.fix: Check the details field for specific validation errors

authRequired.fix: Include an API key in the Authorization header

invalidToken.desc: The provided API key is invalid or expired
invalidToken.fix: Check your API key or generate a new one

insufficientScopes.desc: The API key lacks required permissions
insufficientScopes.fix: Use an API key with the required scopes

notFound.desc: The requested resource was not found
notFound.fix: Check the endpoint URL and resource ID

rateLimited.desc: Too many requests in a short period
rateLimited.fix: Implement rate limiting and retry with backoff

internalError.desc: An unexpected error occurred on the server
internalError.fix: Retry the request or contact support if it persists

handling.title: Handling Errors in Code
handling.desc: Here is an example of robust error handling:

rateLimiting.title: Rate Limiting
rateLimiting.desc: The API implements rate limiting to ensure fair usage. When you exceed the rate limit:
rateLimiting.status429: You will receive a 429 status code
rateLimiting.retryAfter: The response includes a retryAfter field (seconds until you can retry)
rateLimiting.backoff: Implement exponential backoff for automatic retries

bestPractices.title: Error Handling Best Practices
bestPractices.checkSuccess: Always check the success field before processing the response
bestPractices.useCode: Use the code field for programmatic error handling
bestPractices.logErrors: Log errors with context for debugging
bestPractices.retryLogic: Implement retry logic with exponential backoff for transient errors
bestPractices.userFriendly: Show user-friendly messages to end users, not raw error messages

agents.title: Agents API
agents.desc: Create, list, update, and delete AI recruitment agents.

matchResume.title: Match Resume with JD
matchResume.subtitle: Analyze how well a candidate's resume matches a job description
matchResume.resumePlaceholder:
Paste resume content here...

Example:
John Doe
Senior Software Engineer
john.doe@email.com

EXPERIENCE:
Google (2019-2024) - Senior Software Engineer
- Led team of 5 engineers
- Built React dashboard for 10M+ users

SKILLS: Python, JavaScript, React, Node.js, AWS

EDUCATION:
MIT - BS Computer Science, 2017
matchResume.jdPlaceholder:
Paste job description here...

Example:
Senior Software Engineer at TechCorp
Location: San Francisco, CA

About the role:
We are looking for a Senior Software Engineer to lead our backend team.

Required Qualifications:
- 5+ years of software engineering experience
- Expert-level Python programming
- Strong experience with React

Nice to have:
- AWS or cloud infrastructure experience
- Machine Learning background

Responsibilities:
- Lead technical design decisions
- Mentor junior engineers
matchResume.errorMissing: Please provide both resume and job description

seo.description: Learn about RoboHire's mission to democratize hiring with AI.

hero.title: About RoboHire
hero.subtitle: We are building the future of recruitment. Our AI-powered platform helps companies find, evaluate, and hire the best talent — faster, fairer, and smarter than ever before.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.text: To democratize hiring with AI. We believe every company — regardless of size or resources — deserves access to intelligent recruitment tools that eliminate bias, save time, and surface the best candidates.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.text: A world where every company hires the best talent. Where hiring decisions are driven by data and insight — not gut feelings and guesswork. Where candidates are evaluated fairly on their true abilities.

tech.title: How Our AI Works
tech.subtitle: RoboHire combines state-of-the-art language models with recruitment expertise to automate every step of the hiring pipeline.

0.title: Resume Parsing
0.description: Our AI extracts structured data from resumes in any format — PDF, Word, or plain text — understanding context, not just keywords.

1.title: Matching Algorithms
1.description: Advanced language models compare candidate profiles against job requirements with nuanced understanding of skills, experience, and potential.

2.title: Automated Interviews
2.description: AI-conducted video interviews adapt in real-time, asking follow-up questions and evaluating responses with human-level comprehension.

3.title: Evaluation Reports
3.description: Comprehensive scoring reports with detailed breakdowns, cheating analysis, and actionable recommendations for every candidate.

comparison.title: Why RoboHire vs Alternatives
comparison.subtitle: See how RoboHire compares to manual hiring processes and traditional applicant tracking systems.

trust.title: Trust & Security
trust.subtitle: Your data security is our top priority. We employ enterprise-grade security measures to protect every piece of information.

encryption.title: End-to-End Encryption
encryption.description: All data is encrypted in transit (TLS 1.3) and at rest (AES-256).

privacy.title: Privacy Compliance
privacy.description: Fully compliant with GDPR, CCPA, and other major privacy regulations.

soc2.title: SOC 2 Compliant
soc2.description: Our infrastructure meets SOC 2 Type II standards for security, availability, and confidentiality.

cta.title: Ready to transform your hiring?
cta.subtitle: Join hundreds of companies already hiring smarter with RoboHire.

seo.title: Privacy Policy
seo.description: Learn how RoboHire collects, uses, and protects your personal information.

content.p1: We collect information you provide directly to us, including your name, email address, company name, and any other information you choose to provide.
content.p2: When you use RoboHire to process candidates, we collect resumes, job descriptions, interview recordings, and evaluation data.

content.p1: We use the information to provide, maintain, and improve our services.
content.p2: We also use your information to communicate with you about your account.

content.p1: Your data is stored on secure servers with enterprise-grade encryption.
content.p2: We retain your personal data only for as long as necessary.

content.p1: We use trusted third-party services to operate our platform.
content.p2: We do not sell your personal information to third parties.

content.p1: You may have certain rights regarding your personal data.
content.p2: These rights may include the right to access, correct, or delete your personal data.
content.p3: To exercise any of these rights, please contact us at privacy@robohire.io.

content.p1: We use essential cookies to operate our platform.
content.p2: We may also use analytics cookies.

content.p1: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy:

seo.title: Terms of Service
seo.description: Read the Terms of Service for RoboHire.

content.p1: By accessing or using RoboHire, you agree to be bound by these Terms.
content.p2: We may update these Terms from time to time.

content.p1: RoboHire is an AI-powered recruitment platform.
content.p2: We reserve the right to modify, suspend, or discontinue any part of the Service.

content.p1: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account.
content.p2: You must provide accurate and complete information.

content.p1: You agree to use the Service only for lawful purposes.
content.p2: You may not attempt to gain unauthorized access.

content.p1: The Service and its original content are owned by RoboHire.
content.p2: You retain ownership of all data you upload.

content.p1: RoboHire shall not be liable for any indirect damages.
content.p2: AI-generated evaluations are provided as decision-support tools.

content.p1: You may terminate your account at any time.
content.p2: Upon termination, your right to use the Service will cease.

content.p1: If you have any questions about these Terms:

salesKit.seoDesc: RoboHire partner sales kit — product overview, pricing, and resources for startup founders and HR leaders.
salesKit.heroSubtitle: From role brief to final shortlist, hiring moves on autopilot. Help your partners hire smarter, faster, and more consistently.
salesKit.problemSubtitle: Startups are competing for talent against companies with 10x their recruiting budget.
salesKit.problem1Desc: Time-to-hire while competitors close in 2 weeks
salesKit.problem2Desc: Agency fees that drain startup runway
salesKit.problem4Desc: Engineers pulled off product work to interview
salesKit.solutionHeadline: An AI recruiting platform that runs the first 80% of hiring autonomously.
salesKit.solutionSub: From role definition to candidate shortlist — your team only focuses on the final decision.
salesKit.stepsSubtitle: 6 steps to your next great hire
salesKit.step1Desc: AI asks the right questions and produces a structured hiring brief in ~10 minutes.
salesKit.step2Desc: Auto-drafts polished JD with responsibilities, requirements, and benefits.
salesKit.step3Desc: Semantic matching ranks all candidates with scores, grades, and clear reasoning.
salesKit.step4Desc: Auto-send invitations with private links. Candidates self-serve scheduling.
salesKit.step5Desc: 24/7 structured conversations with intelligent follow-ups. 7 languages supported.
salesKit.step6Desc: Structured scorecards with skill fit, experience depth, risk signals, and recommendations.
salesKit.diff1Desc: Not another dashboard. RoboHire executes work — role definition, screening, interviews, evaluations move forward autonomously.
salesKit.diff2Desc: Reads context, not keywords. Connects "3 years of ML projects" with "TensorFlow expertise." Intelligent follow-ups during interviews.
salesKit.diff3Desc: Same questions. Same rubric. Same scoring. No interviewer bias. Clear audit trail when stakeholders ask "why this person?"
salesKit.diff4Desc: No recruiter salary. No agency fees. Professional hiring operations starting at ¥179/month. Scale without adding HR headcount.
salesKit.timeline1Action: Brief the role to AI. Upload 150 resumes. Receive ranked top 15 with reasoning.
salesKit.timeline2Action: All 15 candidates invited to AI interview. Self-serve scheduling — zero coordination.
salesKit.timeline3Action: 12 candidates complete interviews on their own schedule (evenings, weekends).
salesKit.timeline4Action: 4 finalists with structured scorecards. Ready for founder final interviews.
salesKit.testimonial: "During campus hiring, volume is brutal. With RoboHire, every candidate gets the same core questions, scoring is consistent, and our team gets a much clearer read on intent and soft skills."
salesKit.testimonialAttr: — Head of HR, Consumer Internet Company
salesKit.pricingSubtitle: 14-day free trial • No credit card required
salesKit.security1: Data encryption at rest and in transit (AES-256, TLS 1.3)
salesKit.security2: GDPR-ready data handling and candidate consent workflows
salesKit.security4: Data residency options for enterprise customers
salesKit.security5: No candidate data used for AI training — your data stays yours
salesKit.ctaDesc: Let AI handle the repetitive 80%. Keep your team focused on what humans do best: reading nuance, testing fit, and making the final call.
